description: This Kotlin class 'TokenRefresher' manages OAuth token refresh logic in a thread-safe manner, bridging blocking API calls within coroutine context, primarily used for handling token refresh in network authentication.

classes.name: TokenRefresher
classes.description: Manages refresh-token flow in a coroutine-safe manner, integrating with OkHttp's Authenticator API.

methods.name: refreshBlocking
methods.description: Performs a blocking token refresh operation, ensuring only one refresh occurs at a time, returning new session tokens or null on failure.
